title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Philips India Healthcare Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Philips India Healthcare Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare Capital India in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare Capital India:
Philips India Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare Capital India!
